topic: How Abyssal Surge turns 3D source assets into a playable dark-fantasy battlefield

keyframe.use: Atlas keyframe generation when credentials are available

motion.use: Atlas living-poster motion when credentials are available

music.note: Not returned by the public display_console model list checked 2026-07-18; local fallback reuses the repository cinematic bed instead of calling this model.

theme.name: custom-dark-fantasy-constructivist
theme.medium: torn-paper collage plus risograph and photocopy
theme.era: Russian Constructivism crossed with a dark-fantasy field manual
theme.composition: diagonal dynamic layouts, specimen grids, hero headline hierarchy
theme.palette: void black, bone cream, sovereign violet, cold-steel blue, ember orange
theme.type: bold condensed grotesque with Korean gothic companion
theme.finish: newsprint grain, halftone dots, violet ink misregistration, tape and scissor edges
theme.capture: straight-on scanned-flat framing with real paper drop shadows
theme.mood: ominous, engineered, editorial, triumphant at payoff

common_style_block: Mixed-media hand-cut PAPER COLLAGE, editorial dark-fantasy field-manual style, Russian Constructivist diagonals crossed with risograph and photocopy. Torn and scissor-cut paper edges, tape corners, halftone print dots, newspaper clippings, paper-stencil shapes, real paper drop shadows. Figures are PRINTED-texture cut-outs from the supplied Abyssal Surge repository references, NOT CGI and NOT a new 3D render; preserve source identity, print grain, texture seams, and paper imperfections. High contrast, straight-on scanned-flat framing, rigid layered pieces with clear edges and separate shadows. Limited palette of void black, bone cream, sovereign violet, cold-steel blue, and one ember-orange signal accent. 16:9, 2k master.
common_motion_contract: Animate this still into a mixed-media collage MOTION GRAPHIC. Keep rigid flat 2D paper layers parallel to camera, with subtle drop-shadow parallax and approximately five-percent movement. Preserve torn-paper, tape, halftone, newspaper, and paper-stencil textures. Keep every printed headline, Korean subtitle, seal, and layout sharp, legible, and perfectly stable. One smooth continuous shot with one camera move, gentle ease-in-ease-out, a clear settle endpoint, no internal cuts or scene changes.

narration.full_script: These are only source assets: a gate, a citadel, a sovereign. They do not make a battlefield—yet. Each render is cut into readable silhouettes, atlases, actions, and tactical landmarks. Then capture, possession, and domain rules connect those pieces into decisions the player can see. Now the same dark-fantasy art answers every move. Source assets become a playable Abyssal Surge battlefield.
narration.delivery: Measured documentary authority, 150–160 words per minute, restrained urgency, slight lift on 'playable Abyssal Surge battlefield'.

shots.image_prompt: Mixed-media hand-cut PAPER COLLAGE, editorial dark-fantasy field-manual style, Russian Constructivist diagonals crossed with risograph and photocopy. Torn/scissor-cut edges, tape, halftone, newspaper, paper-stencil shapes, real paper shadows; PRINTED-texture cut-outs from supplied references, not a fresh 3D render, preserve grain. Scene as separate layered pieces: a Gate Sovereign specimen card, a Veil Citadel specimen card, a sovereign unit strip, three registration labels and scattered violet scraps, all with distinct edges and shadows. Bold flat void-black paper background with oxidized-violet accent. Torn-paper banner headline exactly "ASSETS ≠ ARMIES" and Korean subheadline exactly "에셋 ≠ 군대" in bold condensed grotesque plus Korean gothic, red-violet seal. Straight-on scanned-flat, high contrast, 16:9, 2k.
shots.motion_prompt: EST_WIDE, one very slow smooth push-in. Three specimen cards settle at staggered rigid-paper depths, violet registration marks pulse, tape corners flutter, and tiny scraps scatter once, then all settle. Preserve printed textures and void-black/violet palette; urgent dark-editorial feel. Flat 2D, camera parallel, lettering and layout locked, single continuous shot.

shots.image_prompt: Mixed-media hand-cut PAPER COLLAGE, editorial dark-fantasy field-manual style, Russian Constructivist diagonals crossed with risograph and photocopy. Torn/scissor-cut edges, tape, halftone, newspaper, paper-stencil shapes, real paper shadows; PRINTED-texture cut-outs from supplied references, preserve grain. Scene as separate layered pieces: a horizontal inspection strip moving from a gate render to an ash-cloth texture swatch, then a blank tactical grid stamped "NOT YET PLAYABLE"; add one rigid paper arrow and a violet specimen number. Bold flat void-black background with bone-paper strips. No headline banner. Straight-on scanned-flat, high contrast, 16:9, 2k.
shots.motion_prompt: DETAIL, one slow horizontal pan. Texture scraps slide beneath the specimen, one rigid arrow travels left-to-right once, halftone dots pulse, and the red stamp settles. Preserve violet/black/bone palette and forensic urgency. Rigid 2D paper, text fixed, single continuous shot with gentle settle.

shots.image_prompt: Mixed-media hand-cut PAPER COLLAGE, editorial dark-fantasy field-manual style, Russian Constructivist diagonals crossed with risograph and photocopy. Torn/scissor-cut edges, tape, halftone, newspaper, paper-stencil shapes, real paper shadows; PRINTED cut-outs from supplied references, preserve source identity and grain. Scene as four separate labeled layers on an engineer's workshop board: sovereign render, unit atlas, capture action icon, citadel landmark; scissor marks and registration crosses show decomposition. Bold flat bone-paper cream background with cold-steel blue and sovereign-violet accents. Banner headline exactly "CUT INTO SYSTEMS" and Korean exactly "시스템으로 자른다" in condensed grotesque/Korean gothic, violet seal. Straight-on scanned-flat, 16:9, 2k.
shots.motion_prompt: WIDE, one subtle multi-layer parallax move. Atlas rows offset at shallow depths, scissors marks trace the sovereign, action tabs hinge open, tape flutters, and violet ink misregistration breathes. Precise engineered feel, cream/steel/violet palette. Flat rigid paper, title stable, one continuous shot, then settle.

shots.image_prompt: Mixed-media hand-cut PAPER COLLAGE, editorial dark-fantasy field-manual style, Russian Constructivist diagonals crossed with risograph and photocopy. Torn/scissor-cut edges, tape, halftone, newspaper, paper-stencil shapes, real paper shadows; preserve source grain. Scene as a vertical inspection column: sovereign atlas cells, a clean silhouette, an action tab, and a tactical tile pinned in separate layers, with numeric paper labels and ruler ticks. Bold flat bone-paper cream background with cold-steel blue. No headline banner. Straight-on scanned-flat, high contrast, 16:9, 2k.
shots.motion_prompt: CLOSE, one very slow vertical tilt. Atlas cells tick downward like a contact sheet, the silhouette pops into focus, tape edges lift, and two labels align. Precise forensic feel, cream and cold-steel palette. Keep rigid 2D dimensions and all labels stable, single continuous shot.

shots.image_prompt: Mixed-media hand-cut PAPER COLLAGE, editorial dark-fantasy field-manual style, Russian Constructivist diagonals crossed with risograph and photocopy. Torn/scissor-cut edges, tape, halftone, newspaper, paper-stencil shapes, real paper shadows; PRINTED source cut-outs, preserve grain. Scene as a tactical board: three torn action cards labeled CAPTURE, POSSESS, DOMAIN wired by rigid paper arrows into a dark battlefield map, with units and command pips on separate layers. Bold flat bruise-purple background with ember-orange signal marks. Banner headline exactly "RULES MAKE WAR" and Korean exactly "규칙이 전장을 만든다" in condensed grotesque/Korean gothic, bone seal. Straight-on scanned-flat, 16:9, 2k.
shots.motion_prompt: WIDE, one slow pull-out revealing the tactical network. CAPTURE, POSSESS, and DOMAIN cards slap down in sequence, rigid arrows extend, command pips flicker, and one violet signal ribbon crosses once. Escalating tactical feel in purple/ember/bone. Flat 2D paper and locked headline, one smooth shot, settle at full map.

shots.image_prompt: Mixed-media hand-cut PAPER COLLAGE, editorial dark-fantasy field-manual style, Russian Constructivist diagonals crossed with risograph and photocopy. Torn/scissor-cut edges, tape, halftone, newspaper, paper-stencil shapes, real paper shadows; PRINTED source cut-outs, preserve grain. Scene as a close layered node transformation: capture seal over a neutral landmark, violet control rings, two units pivoting toward the objective, tiny command scraps on separate shadows. Bold flat bruise-purple background with ember-orange target marks. No headline banner. Straight-on scanned-flat, 16:9, 2k.
shots.motion_prompt: CLOSE with locked camera; one paper capture seal slides into the node as the element move. Control rings pulse outward, two unit cut-outs pivot, scraps settle. Tactical and legible, purple/ember palette. Rigid 2D paper, no layout drift, one continuous shot with endpoint.

shots.image_prompt: Mixed-media hand-cut PAPER COLLAGE, editorial dark-fantasy field-manual style, Russian Constructivist diagonals crossed with risograph and photocopy. Torn/scissor-cut edges, tape, halftone, newspaper, paper-stencil shapes, real paper shadows; PRINTED source cut-outs, preserve identity and grain. Scene as a finished playable battlefield tableau: portal, sovereign units, capture ring, action cards, and dark skyline integrated as clear foreground/midground/background paper layers. Bold flat starless teal-black background opening into sovereign violet. Banner headline exactly "THE ABYSS PLAYS" and Korean exactly "심연이 움직인다" in condensed grotesque/Korean gothic, ember seal. Straight-on scanned-flat, 16:9, 2k.
shots.motion_prompt: EST_WIDE, one slow push-in toward the playable center. Units advance in short paper steps, capture ring radiates, portal fragments orbit as rigid scraps, embers drift behind the stable title. Triumphant ominous feel, teal-black to sovereign-violet payoff. Flat 2D, one continuous shot, settle.

shots.image_prompt: Mixed-media hand-cut PAPER COLLAGE, editorial dark-fantasy field-manual style, Russian Constructivist diagonals crossed with risograph and photocopy. Torn/scissor-cut edges, tape, halftone, newspaper, paper-stencil shapes, real paper shadows; PRINTED source cut-outs, preserve identity and grain. Scene as the completed battlefield held as one legible editorial poster with an Abyssal Surge seal, small source-to-system diagram, and stable final composition. Bold flat starless teal-black background with sovereign-violet ring and ember specks. Final banner title exactly "FROM ASSET TO ABYSS" and Korean exactly "에셋에서 심연으로" in condensed grotesque/Korean gothic. Straight-on scanned-flat, 16:9, 2k.
shots.motion_prompt: WIDE locked-off static payoff. Only low ember flicker, subtle paper breathing, and one seal pulse; the camera, bilingual title, and full layout stay perfectly locked. Resolved triumphant menace in teal-black/violet. Single continuous shot ending on a hard cut.
